## Meeting Purpose

[Panel interview with Andrew Reese for Founding Account Executive role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Andrew has extensive experience in early-stage startups, including founding AE roles at Miro and Canva](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [GrowthX positions itself as a hybrid between in-house AI tools and traditional agencies, offering AI-powered content creation and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Key areas for improvement in Andrew's pitch: increase sense of urgency, balance speed claims with realistic timeline for results, and show more while telling less](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)

## Topics

### Andrew's Background

  - [Founding AE at Miro for 6.5 years (2016-2022)](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Closed $8M in net new revenue, including first 6 and 7-figure deals](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Worked at Canva for 1.5 years, helping build B2B motion](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Featured in Elena Verna's substack on product-led sales motion](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [Positioned between in-house AI tools and traditional agencies](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Combines AI experts with marketing experts](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Offers content creation, distribution, and conversion strategies](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Can launch within a month, with a 4-week process for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2361.0)
  - [Provides transparent insights and acts as an extension of the client's team](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)

### Mock Sales Pitch

  - [Andrew pitched to Kyle (Head of Growth) and Marcel (CEO) at fictional company Granola AI](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Key client needs: double revenue quickly, scale organic channels, prove ROI](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Andrew highlighted GrowthX's ability to create quality content at scale and distribute effectively](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Emphasized past results with clients like Suugo, DeepGram, and Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

### Feedback on Andrew's Pitch

  - [Positive: Good discovery questions, offered demo, secured next steps](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [Areas for improvement:](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
      - [Increase sense of urgency and move faster](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2713.0)
      - [Balance claims of speed with realistic timeline for results](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
      - [Show more while telling (e.g., examples of work, behind-the-scenes processes)](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2630.0)
      - [Position GrowthX as selective, not for everyone](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2799.0)
      - [Highlight long-term sustainable growth vs. quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2935.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrew to research more about content marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2677.0)
  - [Practice incorporating a sense of urgency and "show while telling" approach in pitches](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2958.0)
  - [Follow up with more specific revenue-focused proof points for clients](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2551.0)
  - [Schedule a more in-depth session with Granola AI's growth strategist to dive into GrowthX's AI workflows and content operating system](https://fathom.video/share/dQd2fc1JZfDzjkAeB67-KuZtGyjQrQLT?tab=summary&timestamp=2630.0)
